story.tagline: Discover the story behind our restaurant.
story.heading: Our Story

slides.title: Passion in every dish.
slides.body: We carefully select local ingredients and prepare each dish with love. We hope our food and hospitality make your day a little better.

slides.title: Crafted with care.
slides.body: From the first pour to the last bite, every detail is chosen to give you a moment worth remembering.

slides.title: Thank you for visiting.
slides.body: Your presence means the world to our team. We hope to welcome you back again soon.

slides.title: Fresh from the market.
slides.body: Every morning we choose the best of the season, so what reaches your table is always at its peak.

slides.title: A warm welcome, always.
slides.body: Whether it's your first visit or your hundredth, we're so glad you're here with us today.

support.heading: Support Us
support.intro: If you enjoyed your experience, you can support us with a tip. Thank you!
support.cardHint: Apple Pay, Google Pay, or card.
support.cashHint: No card — it's added to your bill and settled at the register.
support.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

payment.heading: Complete Your Tip
payment.processingNote: Your payment is processed securely by Stripe.
payment.errorGeneric: Something went wrong with your payment. Please try again.
payment.errorCard: Your card was declined. Please check the details or try another card.
payment.notConfigured: Payment is not available right now.

review.heading: Leave a Review
review.question: How was your experience?
review.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.subtitlePart1: Your support means a lot to us.
thankYou.subtitlePart2: We'll keep doing our best for you!
thankYou.privateNote: Your feedback has been shared with the store team.
